response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics for 'Zankyou Sanka'. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was fully utilized for the song performance; manual transcription and translation were performed for the preceding conversation and the ending narration. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly synchronized with vocal onset. Rapid speech in the conversation was handled with aggressive truncation to maintain flow, and the outro narration was timed to the spoken phrases.

subtitles.original: Anything? Yeah, I like anything.
subtitles.english: Anything? Yeah, I like anything.

subtitles.original: あとはー、ほかにはー？
subtitles.english: What else is there?

subtitles.original: あー、冷やしうどんとか、普通の汁ありうどんとか、温泉卵とか...
subtitles.english: Like cold udon, regular soup udon, or with a soft-boiled egg...

subtitles.original: おー、色々あるね！
subtitles.english: Oh, so many kinds!

subtitles.original: Yes! そう、色々、何でも大好き！
subtitles.english: Yes! I love them all!

subtitles.original: 何でも、何でも大好き。
subtitles.english: I love anything and everything.

subtitles.original: Yes! 何でも、何でも！
subtitles.english: Yes! Anything, anything!

subtitles.original: あ、じゃあ一緒にディナーに行こう！
subtitles.english: Oh, then let's go to dinner together!

subtitles.original: Oh, dinner! Yeah! Oh my god, that would be really good!
subtitles.english: Oh, dinner! Yeah! Oh my god, that would be really good!

subtitles.original: そう、クロニー、今日のハッシュタグは？
subtitles.english: So Kronii, what's today's hashtag?

subtitles.original: Oh yeah! I mean, if you guys haven't already checked it out...
subtitles.english: Oh yeah! I mean, if you guys haven't already checked it out...

subtitles.original: ...right there! #krorigin
subtitles.english: ...right there! #krorigin

subtitles.original: #krorigin!
subtitles.english: #krorigin!

subtitles.original: And yeah, I hope you guys use this hashtag.
subtitles.english: And yeah, I hope you guys use this hashtag.

subtitles.original: It's gonna be awesome, absolute cinema!
subtitles.english: It's gonna be awesome, absolute cinema!

subtitles.original: And so yeah, keep on the lookout for Fallen Grace!
subtitles.english: And so yeah, keep on the lookout for Fallen Grace!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for coming!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming!

subtitles.original: 本当にありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: こちらこそありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you as well!

subtitles.original: これからも仲良くしてね！
subtitles.english: Let's be good friends from now on!

subtitles.original: Yeah, oh, それは嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: Yeah, oh, I'm happy to hear that!

subtitles.original: 大好きなフレンドだから！
subtitles.english: Because you're my favorite friend!

subtitles.original: Oh my god! Oh my god! Oh my god!
subtitles.english: Oh my god! Oh my god! Oh my god!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、またねー！
subtitles.english: Well, see you later!

subtitles.original: Congratulations!
subtitles.english: Congratulations!

subtitles.original: Oh, thank you! Yay!
subtitles.english: Oh, thank you! Yay!

subtitles.original: 残響散歌
subtitles.english: [Song: Zankyou Sanka]

subtitles.original: 誰が袖に咲く幻花
subtitles.english: An illusional flower blooms on someone's sleeve

subtitles.original: ただそこに藍を落とした
subtitles.english: With a drip of deep blue

subtitles.original: 派手に色を溶かす夜に
subtitles.english: Splashes of colors dissolve into the night

subtitles.original: 銀朱の月を添えて
subtitles.english: With the silver-red moon on the side

subtitles.original: 転がるように風を切って
subtitles.english: I cut through the wind like rolling

subtitles.original: 躓くごとに強くなった
subtitles.english: And became stronger every time I stumbled

subtitles.original: 光も痛みも怒りも全部抱き締めて
subtitles.english: Embracing everything from light to pain to anger

subtitles.original: 選ばれなければ 選べばいい
subtitles.english: If I am not chosen, just be the one to choose

subtitles.original: 声よ轟け 夜のその向こうへ
subtitles.english: Let the voice resonate beyond the night

subtitles.original: 涙で滲んでた
subtitles.english: That blurred in tears

subtitles.original: あんなに遠くの景色まで
subtitles.english: To the faraway landscape

subtitles.original: 響き渡れ
subtitles.english: Resonate far and wide

subtitles.original: 何を奏でて？ 誰に届けたくて？
subtitles.english: By playing what? To reach whom?

subtitles.original: 不確かなままでいい
subtitles.english: It's okay to be unsure

subtitles.original: どんなに暗い感情も
subtitles.english: No matter how dark the emotions

subtitles.original: どんなに長い葛藤も
subtitles.english: Or how long the dilemma has lingered

subtitles.original: 歌と散れ 残響
subtitles.english: May they all scatter in echoes

subtitles.original: ただ一人舞う千夜
subtitles.english: Alone dancing in one thousand nights

subtitles.original: 違えない帯を結べば
subtitles.english: And tying the sashes that cannot be mistied

subtitles.original: 派手な色も負かす様に
subtitles.english: To get the better of the vivid colors

subtitles.original: 深紅の香こそあはれ
subtitles.english: The deep red scent is so profound

subtitles.original: この先どんなつらい時も
subtitles.english: No matter how hard it will become along the way

subtitles.original: 口先よりも胸を張って
subtitles.english: I will take pride rather than be all mouth

subtitles.original: 抱いた夢の明かりを全部
subtitles.english: And just trace every single light of dreams

subtitles.original: 辿るだけ
subtitles.english: I have had

subtitles.original: 逃げ出す為 ここまで来たんじゃないだろ？
subtitles.english: I have not come this far to run away, have I?

subtitles.original: 選ばれなければ 選べばいい
subtitles.english: If I am not chosen, just be the one to choose

subtitles.original: 声をからして
subtitles.english: Screaming myself hoarse

subtitles.original: 燃える花のように
subtitles.english: Like a burning flower

subtitles.original: 闇魔を照らしたら
subtitles.english: If I shed light to the dark space

subtitles.original: 曖昧すぎる正解も
subtitles.english: The all-too-vague right answer

subtitles.original: 譜面にして
subtitles.english: May turn into music

subtitles.original: 夜を数えて 朝を描く様な
subtitles.english: As if counting the nights to draw the morning

subtitles.original: 鮮やかな音を鳴らす
subtitles.english: And ring vividly

subtitles.original: どんなに深い後悔も
subtitles.english: No matter how deep the regret

subtitles.original: どんなに高い限界も
subtitles.english: Or how high the limit

subtitles.original: 掻き消して 残響
subtitles.english: May they all vanish in echoes

subtitles.original: In the heavenly realm, there is a Lake of Light that controls all worlds...
subtitles.english: In the heavenly realm, there is a Lake of Light that controls all worlds...

subtitles.original: ...and Kronii would always observe the human world from there out of curiosity.
subtitles.english: ...and Kronii would always observe the human world from there out of curiosity.
